title: LIVE NOW! Green molecules – How can they strengthen Europe’s energy security and industrial competitiveness? [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Europe’s renewed exposure to geopolitical instability has underscored the urgency of reducing its dependence on imported fossil fuels. Ensuring a resilient, sustainable and secure energy supply is now a central pillar of the EU’s economic and strategic agenda. In this context, green molecules have been highlighted as one of the key enablers of greater energy […]
